git commends:

git add .
git commit -m "your commit"
git remote add origin https://github.com/Rahi-007/Fuel-Stations.git
git remote
git push 
git stash
git pull
git stash apply
git merge master (master theke preview pull)
git merge preview (preview theke master pull)
pull korte vule gele : git pull --rebase origin master
